# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/macos
# It was generated by CMake: /Applications/CMake.app/Contents/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Generate index for LLVM archive

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

// MinSizeRel ...

WHISPER_COREML_ALLOW_FALLBACK:BOOL=OFF

//whisper: use libcurl to download model from an URL
WHISPER_CURL:BOOL=OFF

//whisper: enable -Werror flag
WHISPER_FATAL_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Location of header  files
WHISPER_INCLUDE_INSTALL_DIR:PATH=include

//Location of library files
WHISPER_LIB_INSTALL_DIR:PATH=lib

//whisper: support for OpenVINO
WHISPER_OPENVINO:BOOL=OFF

//whisper: enable address sanitizer
WHISPER_SANITIZE_ADDRESS:BOOL=OFF

//whisper: enable thread sanitizer
WHISPER_SANITIZE_THREAD:BOOL=OFF

//whisper: enable undefined sanitizer
WHISPER_SANITIZE_UNDEFINED:BOOL=OFF

//whisper: support for libSDL2
WHISPER_SDL2:BOOL=OFF

//whisper: use system-installed GGML library
WHISPER_USE_SYSTEM_GGML:BOOL=OFF

//ggml: path to ZenDNN installation
ZENDNN_ROOT:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
ggml_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/macos/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml

//Value Computed by CMake
ggml_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
ggml_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/macos/_deps/whispercpp-src/ggml

//Path to a library.
pkgcfg_lib_MPV_mpv:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/mpv/0.41.0_4/lib/libmpv.dylib

//Value Computed by CMake
whisper.cpp_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/macos/_deps/whispercpp-build

//Value Computed by CMake
whisper.cpp_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
whisper.cpp_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/macos/_deps/whispercpp-src

//Dependencies for the target
whisper_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;ggml;
